title: Sean Chen
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Sean Chen
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
education_entries: Ph D in Finance, University of Oregon
MS in Quantitative Finance, Swiss Federal Institute of Technology
MS in Statistics and Finance, University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign
research_interests: Empirical Corporate Finance, Financial Institutions, Corporate Innovation
teaching_interests: Corporate Finance, Portfolio Management, Derivatives and Risk Management, Data Management & Analytics
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). Common Ownership along the Supply Chain and Supplier Innovations . Pacific-Basin Finance Journal.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). The Effect of Managerial Horizon and Excess Cash on Firm Value . Journal of International Finance and Economics.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). Common Ownership and Corporate Innovation Strategy . Corporate Ownership and Control.

Presentations: Xian Chen, Financial Management Association Conference, "Common Ownership along the Supply Chain and Supplier Innovations," Boulder, Colorado. (2021)
